Archai are very high [[Transapients]]. They can be either [[kami]], or [[oni|archon]]. They are theorized as a means to achieve [[utopia]] for [[sapients]] and are thus a critical long term component of the plan to get everyone [[to Omega]]. 

In practice they do not exist yet and are likely too distant to do serious thinking on. 
[[Category:Transapients]]
[[sn:Archai]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
